'''Ktlin''' was the name given to a domesticated [[mosgoth]] owned by [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]] [[Mlatar Thon Gra]]. Mlatar used Ktlin as a flying transport in the [[City/Legends|cities]] of [[Zuliria]] as an alternative to the more common [[ruori]].<ref name="AIR" />
